value.stringValue: Please review the information and try again.
Congratulations on Becoming an Authorized Agent
Congratulations on Becoming an Authorized Agent

rules.name: Does_not_exist_or_Is_not_Chuzo_Member
rules.label: Does not exist or Is not Chuzo Member

rules.name: Create_Chuzo_User
rules.conditionLogic: 1 OR (2 AND (3 OR 4 ) AND (5 OR 6 OR 7))
rules.label: Create Chuzo User

Flow.description: This flow creates the representative user when Activate Representative button is clicked
Flow.label: Create Representative User

recordLookups.description: This flow gets the account assigned to the contact
recordLookups.name: Get_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Account

fields.name: ErrorMessageStatus
fields.fieldText: The agent can't be activated since the On Boarding Status is {!Get_Contact.POE_RO_Status__c}

screens.name: Contact_Has_No_Email_Error_Screen
screens.label: Contact Has No Email Error Screen

fields.name: Copy_1_of_ErrorMessageStatus
fields.fieldText: Contact needs an email address to be activated.

fields.name: noFunctionalRoleError
fields.fieldText: Contact Functional Role is required for agent activation﻿﻿

fields.name: message
fields.fieldText: Please click the Activate button to proceed

fields.name: text2
fields.fieldText:
{!Get_User.Contact.Name} is an existing Chuzo Member.

Username: {!Get_User.Username}

subflows.name: Subflow_Assign_Chuzo_Permission_Sets_By_Representative_Type_Flow_1
subflows.label: Subflow - Assign Chuzo Permission Sets By Representative Type Flow 1

textTemplates.name: agentbodytemplate
textTemplates.text:
Congratulations on
Becoming an Authorized Agent


Start Selling Now

Let's Get Started

Username: {!userEmailWithSufix}

Contact your administrator to set up your password.

Once you have reset your password, your Chuzo setup is complete! Please click here to start selling!

Getting Started with Chuzo

  • Make sure to turn on geolocation
  • Turn off any ad blockers and allow pop-ups for the site
  • Add noreply@salesforce.com to your email safe sender list
  • Chuzo seems to work best in Microsoft Edge and Google Chrome. Please avoid using Safari
Follow on X   Friend on Facebook   Connect on LinkedIn
Copyright © 2025, All rights reserved.

Our mailing address is:

PerfectVision
16101 La Grande Dr.
Little Rock, AR 72223

textTemplates.description: Backup of agentBodyTemplate's value before the changes from PER-3151
textTemplates.name: agentBodyTemplateBackup
textTemplates.text:
Congratulations, You Now Have Access to Place Orders Via Chuzo Order Entry!





Start Selling Now

Let's Get Started


  • Click Here to Access Chuzo Order Entry Portal


Login Information


Click here to set up your password

Username: {!userEmailWithSufix}

Resources


PerfectVision offer resources that will keep your dealership up-to-date on the products, promotions and important communications from our partners.


Note: You must be signed in to the PerfectVision Website to view the Partner Resources pages.

  • Who to Call
  • How to Navigate Chuzo




Your Support Team


We have dedicated team members that cover all 50 states that support your business. Find Your Rep.

Customer Service


800.205.8620 ext. 2655

CustomerService@perfect-vision.com
  • General Request or Escalations
  • Product Returns
  • Shipment Discrepancies
  • Website Support
  • Insurance / Resale Document
  • Reporting & Order Support

Commission Escalations


800.205.8620 ext. 2140

CommissionEscalations@perfect-vision.com
  • Commission Support
  • Incentive Pay Questions
  • Incorrect Payment
  • Order Status Dispute

Marketing


800.205.8620 ext. 2611

PVMarketing@perfect-vision.com



  • General Marketing Assistance
  • Building Ads
  • Ordering or Placing Pre-approved Ads
  • Marketing Consulting
  • Marketing Guidelines

PerfectVision Website Training Resources


Click here for the Training Calendar






How Was Your Onboarding Experience?


Tell us how we did by filling out a brief survey about your onboarding experience.








































Follow on Twitter   Friend on Facebook   Connect on LinkedIn


Copyright © 2021, All rights reserved.



Our mailing address is:



PerfectVision

16101 La Grande Drive

Little Rock, 72223

United States

textTemplates.name: bodytemplate
textTemplates.text:
Congratulations on
Becoming an Authorized Agent


Start Selling Now

Let's Get Started

Username: {!userEmailWithSufix}

Contact your administrator to set up your password.

Once you have reset your password, your Chuzo setup is complete! Please click here to start selling!

Getting Started with Chuzo

  • Make sure to turn on geolocation
  • Turn off any ad blockers and allow pop-ups for the site
  • Add noreply@salesforce.com to your email safe sender list
  • Chuzo seems to work best in Microsoft Edge and Google Chrome. Please avoid using Safari

Your Support Team

For assistance please reach out to Chuzo Support or submit a case in Chuzo. To learn how to submit a case, click here.

Chuzo Support

ChuzoSupport@perfect-vision.com
  • Order Entry Down
  • Error Messages
  • Technical Errors

How Was Your Onboarding Experience?

Tell us how we did by filling out a brief survey about your onboarding experience.
Follow on X   Friend on Facebook   Connect on LinkedIn
Copyright © 2025, All rights reserved.

Our mailing address is:

PerfectVision
16101 La Grande Dr.
Little Rock, AR 72223
